SEARCH
Package grafioschtrader.entities

Class StandingOrderFailure

java.lang.Object
grafioschtrader.entities.StandingOrderFailure
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
@Entity public class StandingOrderFailure extends Object implements Serializable
Records a single execution failure of a StandingOrder. Business errors (no price, zero units) go into businessError; unexpected runtime exceptions go into unexpectedError (truncated to 4096 characters). Tenant scoping is implicit via FK to standing_order.
See Also:
